projects.name: Sub-Config-Extractor
projects.description: Sub-Config-Extractor is a powerful yet lightweight tool for extracting, decoding, and converting proxy subscription data into structured configuration files. It supports VMess, VLess, Trojan, and Shadowsocks, and outputs clean YAML or JSON configs compatible with Clash, Surfboard, V2RayN, and other clients for seamless proxy management.
